crisis.headline: Testosterone has fallen ~1% per year for four decades.
crisis.body_md: A generation of men is producing measurably less testosterone than their fathers at the same age. The root cause is environmental and lifestyle-driven, and most of it is reversible.

stats.caption: average free T in 30-year-olds vs. 1985 baseline
men under 40 with sub-clinical low T

science.headline: How endogenous testosterone is actually built
science.body_md: The hypothalamus pulses GnRH -> pituitary releases LH -> Leydig cells synthesise testosterone from cholesterol, mediated by sleep architecture, zinc/magnesium status, vitamin D, and absence of inflammatory load. Fascia restriction in the deep front line and hip flexors compresses the lumbar plexus and reduces pelvic blood flow, which downregulates Leydig output.

enemies.headline: What is suppressing your T
enemies.body_md: Endocrine-disrupting plastics (BPA, phthalates), chronic sleep deprivation, visceral adiposity, sedentary hip-flexion all day, alcohol, refined seed oils, micronutrient deficiency (Zn, Mg, vit D), and unmanaged cortisol load.

supplements.name: Vitamin D3 + K2
supplements.rationale: Vitamin D directly upregulates androgen receptor expression. Target serum 25-OH at 50-70 ng/mL.

supplements.name: Magnesium Glycinate
supplements.rationale: Co-factor in 300+ reactions including the Leydig cell conversion of cholesterol to T. Improves deep-sleep architecture, when most T is produced.

supplements.name: Zinc Picolinate
supplements.rationale: Aromatase inhibitor; deficiency directly tanks free T. Most men eating modern diets are deficient.

supplements.name: NMN
supplements.rationale: NAD+ precursor - supports mitochondrial energy in Leydig cells; declining NAD+ is implicated in age-related steroidogenesis decline.

supplements.name: Resveratrol
supplements.rationale: Mild aromatase inhibitor; supports estrogen clearance and SHBG balance. Stack with the D3+K2 fat-containing meal for absorption.

eat: Pasture-raised eggs, full yolk (cholesterol = T precursor)
windows: 16:8 time-restricted eating, last meal 3 h pre-sleep
Carbs concentrated in evening window for cortisol/T balance
